mapper.select:
SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.min_order_value as "minOrderValue", p.max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", p.start_date as "startDate", p.end_date as "endDate", p.usage_limit as "usageLimit", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.usage_per_customer as "usagePerCustomer", p.state_id as "stateId", p.flow_id as "flowId" FROM coupon p
AND p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND p.discount_type = #{discountType} AND p.state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.min_order_value as "minOrderValue", p.max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", p.start_date as "startDate", p.end_date as "endDate", p.usage_limit as "usageLimit", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.usage_per_customer as "usagePerCustomer", p.state_id as "stateId", p.flow_id as "flowId" FROM coupon p WHERE p.code = #{code}
SELECT p.state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM coupon p GROUP BY p.state_id
SELECT count(DISTINCT p.state_id) FROM coupon p

SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.start_date as "startDate", p.end_date as "endDate", p.usage_limit as "usageLimit", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.state_id as "stateId" FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND p.discount_type = #{discountType}
SELECT count(*) FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND p.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') AND p.discount_type = #{discountType}

SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.end_date as "endDate", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.usage_limit as "usageLimit", p.state_id as "stateId", EXTRACT(DAY FROM (p.end_date - CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) as "daysUntilExpiry" FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND p.end_date IS NOT NULL AND p.end_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND p.end_date <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY p.end_date ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND p.end_date IS NOT NULL AND p.end_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND p.end_date <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.description as description, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.min_order_value as "minOrderValue", p.max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", p.state_id as "stateId" FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND (p.end_date IS NULL OR p.end_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (p.usage_limit IS NULL OR p.usage_limit = 0 OR p.usage_count < p.usage_limit) AND (p.min_order_value IS NULL OR p.min_order_value <= #{cartTotal})

SELECT count(*) FROM coupon p WHERE p.state_id = 'ACTIVE' AND (p.end_date IS NULL OR p.end_date > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND (p.usage_limit IS NULL OR p.usage_limit = 0 OR p.usage_count < p.usage_limit) AND (p.min_order_value IS NULL OR p.min_order_value <= #{cartTotal})

SELECT p.id as id, p.code as code, p.name as name, p.discount_type as "discountType", p.discount_value as "discountValue", p.min_order_value as "minOrderValue", p.max_discount_amount as "maxDiscountAmount", p.usage_limit as "usageLimit", p.usage_count as "usageCount", p.state_id as "stateId", CASE WHEN p.state_id != 'ACTIVE' THEN 'INACTIVE' WHEN p.end_date IS NOT NULL AND p.end_date <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 'EXPIRED' WHEN p.usage_limit > 0 AND p.usage_count >= p.usage_limit THEN 'USAGE_EXHAUSTED' WHEN p.min_order_value IS NOT NULL AND p.min_order_value > #{cartTotal} THEN 'MIN_ORDER_NOT_MET' ELSE 'VALID' END as "validationStatus" FROM coupon p WHERE p.code = #{code}
